comments: Instruction for the verifier to scan the QR code
Screen header shown on the about page of the wallet
Screen title that describes information about a trusted party or organization

onboarding.biometrics.subtitle.message: Activate the biometrics functionality of your phone to make sure only you can enter your wallet and share data.
comments: Subtitle explaining purpose of biometrics
onboarding.biometrics.subtitle.translation: Aktiveer daardie biometrische funksie van jou telefoon zodit all'n jij toegang hett tot jou beursie en gegees kan delen.

comments: Label for activity log
Title of the activity screen showing shared or received credentials

activity.emptyDescription.message: Activity will appear here once you share or receive credentials.
comments: Shown below the empty activity title to explain why the list is empty
activity.emptyDescription.translation: Aktiwiteit verskyn hier sodra jou kaarte deelt of ontvang.

onboardingWalletExplanation.slide1.subti.message: Add digital cards with your information, and  share them easily with others. It’s like having your wallet on your phone.
comments: Subtitle for first slide of wallet onboarding
onboardingWalletExplanation.slide1.subti.translation: Voeg digitale kaarte met jou inligting toe en deel ze eenvoudig met anderen. Daardie is alsof jou jou portemonnee op jou telefoon hett.

onboardingWalletExplanation.slide3.subti.message: Add your cards and documents by scanning QR codes. When organizations request your data, you can review and share with a tap in the app. Your information is always secure with your PIN or fingerprint.
comments: Subtitle for third slide of wallet onboarding
onboardingWalletExplanation.slide3.subti.translation: Voeg jou kaarte en dokumenten toe deur QR-kodes te scannen. Wanneer organisasies jou gegees opvragen, kun jou ze bekijken en delen met 'n tik in daardie app. Je inligting is altyd veilig met jou pincodaardie of vingerafdruk.

comments: Shown when a new card has been added
The age of a person
Used as prefix to indicate the age of a person is over a certain age.
Title for the all cards summary box

trust.warning.message: Always consider whether sharing with an organization is wise.
comments: Shown as a warning box when viewing a trusted party’s detail
trust.warning.translation: Overweeg altyd goed of delen met 'n organisasie verstandig is.

interactionError.message.connect.message: An error occurred while connecting. Generate a new QR-code or try again later.
comments: Error message when connection fails during connect interaction
interactionError.message.connect.translation: Daar is 'n fout daardie voorgekom by daardie konnekteer. Maak 'n nieuwe QR-kodaardie aan of probeer daardie later opnieuw.

interactionError.message.issue.message: An error occurred while fetching the card information. Ask the issuer to generate a new QR-code or try again later.
comments: Error message when credential issuance fails to fetch card info
interactionError.message.issue.translation: Daar is 'n fout daardie voorgekom by daardie ophalen van daardie kaartinligting. Vraag daardie uitgever om 'n nieuwe QR-kodaardie te maken of probeer daardie later opnieuw.

deferredCredentials.failedToRetrieveCard.message: An error occurred while retrieving the card from the issuer.
comments: Description of the error box explaining pending credentials
deferredCredentials.failedToRetrieveCard.translation: Daar is 'n fout daardie voorgekom by daardie ophalen van daardie kaart van daardie uitgever.

interactionError.message.verify.message: An error occurred while sharing the card information. Ask the verifier to generate a new QR-code or try again later.
comments: Error message when sharing a credential for verification fails
interactionError.message.verify.translation: Daar is 'n fout daardie voorgekom by daardie delen van daardie kaartinligting. Vraag daardie controleur om 'n nieuwe QR-kodaardie te maken of probeer daardie later opnieuw.

interactionError.message.sign.message: An error occurred while signing with your card information. Ask the verifier to generate a new QR-code or try again later.
comments: Error message when signing fails with selected credentials
interactionError.message.sign.translation: Daar is 'n fout daardie voorgekom by daardie ondertekenen met jou kaartinligting. Vraag daardie controleur om 'n nieuwe QR-kodaardie te maken of probeer dit later opnieuw.

aiOverAking.errorReason.message: An error occurred while validating the verification
aiOverAking.errorReason.translation: Daar is 'n fout daardie voorgekom by daardie valideren van daardie verificatie

common.errorEnablingBiometrics.message: An unknown error occurred while changing the biometric authentication settings.
common.errorEnablingBiometrics.translation: Daar is 'n onbekendaardie fout daardie voorgekom tijdens daardie wijzigen van daardie biometrische verifikasie-instellingen.

verifyPartySlide.connectSubtitleUnknownO.message: An unknown organization wants to connect with you.
verifyPartySlide.connectSubtitleUnknownO.translation: 'n onbekendaardie organisasie wil konnekteer met jou.

verifyPartySlide.signingSubtitleUnknownO.message: An unknown organization wants to interact to create a digital signature for a document.
verifyPartySlide.signingSubtitleUnknownO.translation: 'n onbekendaardie organisasie wil 'n digitale handtekening stel vir 'n dokument.

verifyPartySlide.offerCardSubtitleUnknow.message: An unknown organization wants to offer you a card.
verifyPartySlide.offerCardSubtitleUnknow.translation: 'n onbekendaardie organisasie wil jou 'n kaart aanbied.

verifyPartySlide.requestSubtitleUnknownO.message: An unknown organization wants to request information from you.
verifyPartySlide.requestSubtitleUnknownO.translation: 'n onbekendaardie organisasie wil inligting van jou opvragen.

deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.message: The issuer of the card indicated you should check again at {0}.
comments: Description of the info box explaining the card is pending with expected time
deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.translation: Daardie uitgever van daardie kaart geeft aan dit jou daardie om {0} opnieuw kan proberen.

deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.message: The issuer of the card indicated you should check again on {0}.

0:
i18n.date(nextCheck, {
                        year: 'numeric',
                        month: 'long',
                        day: 'numeric',
                        hour: 'numeric',
                        minute: 'numeric',
                      })

comments: Description of the info box explaining the card is pending with expected date
deferredCredentials.cardNotAvailableYetW.translation: Daardie uitgever van daardie kaart geeft aan dit jou daardie op {0} opnieuw kan proberen.

comments: Label shown above optional extra description
txCodeSlide.descriptionIntro.translation: Daardie uitgever heeft daardie volgendaardie verstrekt:

requestPurpose.overaskingWarning.message: The purpose given does not match the data requested.
comments: Warning shown when the declared purpose does not align with the data requested by the organization
requestPurpose.overaskingWarning.translation: Daardie opgegee doel komt nie over'n met daardie gevraagdaardie gegees.

cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.validityPeri.message: The validity period of this card is from {0} until {1}.
cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.validityPeri.translation: Daardie geldigheidsperiodaardie van hierdaardie kaart is van {0} tot {1}.

trust.noApprovals.message: There are no organizations that have approved {name}.
comments: A message shown when there are no organizations that approved the current party
trust.noApprovals.translation: Daar is geen organisasies daardie {name} hetis goedgekeurd.

trust.noApprovalsWithoutOrganizationName.message: There are no organizations that have approved this unknown organization.
comments: A message shown when there are no organizations that approved the current party, but the organization name is not known
trust.noApprovalsWithoutOrganizationName.translation: Daar is geen organisasies daardie hierdaardie onbekendaardie organisasie hetis goedgekeurd.

comments: Shown when the user has no credentials
Shown when the user has no activity items yet

onboardingIdCardRequestedAttributes.desc.message: These {0} attributes will be read from your eID card.
comments: Text explaining how many attributes will be read from the eID card
onboardingIdCardRequestedAttributes.desc.translation: Hierdaardie {0} attribute word gelezen van jou eID-kaart.

confirmationSheet.description.translation: Hierdaardie actie kan nie ongedaan word geskept.

qrScanner.permissionDescription.message: This allows the app to scan QR codes that include credentials or data requests.
comments: Description explaining why camera permission is needed
qrScanner.permissionDescription.translation: Hiermee kan daardie app QR-kodes scannen daardie kaarte of gegeesversoeken bevatten.

offlineQr.allowBluetoothAccessDescriptio.message: This allows the app to share with a QR code.
offlineQr.allowBluetoothAccessDescriptio.translation: Hiermee kan daardie app delen via 'n QR-kode.

paradymWallet.about.description.message: This app was created by Animo Solutions as a companion app for Paradym. All code is available under Apache 2.0.
comments: About screen description text for the Paradym wallet
paradymWallet.about.description.translation: Hierdaardie app is geskept deur Animo Solutions als begeleidendaardie app vir Paradym. Alle codaardie is beskikbaar onder Apache 2.0.

funkeWallet.about.description.message: This app was created by Animo Solutions in the context of the SPRIN-D Funke ‘EUDI Wallet Prototypes’. It serves as a prototype for future wallet providers. All code is available under Apache 2.0.
comments: About screen description text for the Funke wallet
funkeWallet.about.description.translation: Hierdaardie app is geskept deur Animo Solutions in daardie kader van daardie SPRIN-D Funke 'EUDI Beursie Prototypes'. Daardie daardient als prototype vir toekomstige beursie-aanbieders. Alle codaardie is beskikbaar onder Apache 2.0.

didxWallet.about.description.message: This app was created by DIDx in the context of the DFID ‘Wallet Prototype’. It serves as a prototype for future wallet providers. All code is available under Apache 2.0.
comments: About screen description text for the DIDx wallet
didxWallet.about.description.translation: Hierdaardie program is deur DIDx geskep in daardie konteks van daardie DFID 'Beursie-prototipe'. Dit daardien as 'n prototipe vir toekomstige beursie-verskaffers. Al daardie kodaardie is beskikbaar onder Apache 2.0.

cardLifecycle.batch.sheetDescription.message: This card requires periodic validation using an internet connection. When usage is low you will be notified.
cardLifecycle.batch.sheetDescription.translation: Hierdaardie kaart vereist periodaardieke validitie via 'n internetkoneksie. Jou krijgt 'n melding wanneer daardie gebruik laag is.

cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.activeIn.message: This card will be active in {activeDaysString}, on {0}.
cardLifecycle.limitedByDate.activeIn.translation: Hierdaardie kaart wordt aktief oor {activeDaysString}, op {0}.

common.featureNotSupported.message: This feature is not supported in this version of the app.
comments: Shown when a feature that is not supported is accessed
common.featureNotSupported.translation: Hierdaardie funksie wordt nie ondersteun in hierdaardie versie van daardie app.

comments: Title shown for offline message

pidSetup.idCardPin.subtitle.message: This is required to read data from your card.
pidSetup.idCardPin.subtitle.translation: Dit is nodig om gegees van jou kaart te lezen.

onboardingWelcome.description.message: This is your digital wallet. With it, you can store and share information about yourself.
comments: Intro paragraph on the welcome screen
onboardingWelcome.description.translation: Dit is jou digitale beursie. Hiermee kun jou inligting oor jezelf stoor en delen.

comments: Title for first slide of wallet onboarding
Heading shown on empty wallet screen

requestPurpose.infoSheet.description.message: This organization seems to be asking for different or more data than their purpose suggests. Read the request carefully. You can deny the request if you do not agree with the data asked.
comments: Description text in the overasking info sheet
requestPurpose.infoSheet.description.translation: Hierdaardie organisasie lijkt andere of meer gegees te vragen dan hul doel suggereert. Lees daardie versoek zorgvuldig. Jy kan daardie versoek weigeren als jou daardie nie eens ist met daardie gevraagdaardie gegees.

onboarding.pin.subtitle.message: This PIN secures your identity wallet. You enter it every time you share data.
comments: Explanation of the PIN purpose in onboarding
onboarding.pin.subtitle.translation: Hierdaardie pincodaardie beveiligt jou identiteitsbeursie. Je voert hierdaardie in elke keer dit jou gegees deelt.

common.archiveCardDescription.message: This will make {name} unusable and delete it from your wallet.
comments: Description in confirmation dialog explaining card archiving
common.archiveCardDescription.translation: Dit skept {name} onbruikbaar en verwijdert hierdaardie uit jou beursie.

pidSetup.enableBiometrics.subtitle.message: To continue, make sure your device has biometric protection enabled, and that Paradym Wallet is allowed to use biometrics.
pidSetup.enableBiometrics.subtitle.translation: Om deur te gaan, zorg ervir dit jou apparaat biometrische sekuriteit heeft ingeschakeld en dit Paradym Beursie biometrie mag gebruiken.

credentialCardSlide.subtitle.pin.message: To receive this card from {issuerName}, you need to enter a PIN.
comments: Subtitle shown when entering a PIN is required to receive the credential
credentialCardSlide.subtitle.pin.translation: Om hierdaardie kaart van {issuerName} te ontvang, moet jou 'n pincodaardie invoeren.

credentialCardSlide.subtitle.presentatio.message: To receive this card from {issuerName}, you need to share cards from your wallet.
comments: Subtitle shown when presentation of other credentials is required
credentialCardSlide.subtitle.presentatio.translation: Om hierdaardie kaart van {issuerName} te ontvang, moet jou kaarte uit jou beursie delen.

txCodeSlide.instructions.message: To receive this card you need to enter a transaction code. This code has been provided to you by the issuer.
comments: Instructions explaining why the user must enter a transaction code
txCodeSlide.instructions.translation: Om hierdaardie kaart te ontvang moet jou 'n transactiecodaardie invoeren. Hierdaardie codaardie is jou verstrekt deur daardie uitgever.

authCodeFlowSlide.description.message: To receive this card, you need to authorize with your account. You will now be redirected to the issuer's website.
comments: Explanation for why user is redirected to external site
authCodeFlowSlide.description.translation: Om hierdaardie kaart te ontvang, moet jou autoriseren met jou account. Je wordt nou doorgestuurd na daardie website van daardie uitgever.

comments: Heading shown when the user has entered too many incorrect PINs
Label for the input field where the user types the transaction code
Subheading for list of organizations that trust the current one
The United Nations distinguishing sign of an mDL
Shown when fetching an invitation from a URL fails
Heading shown above a list of requested cards the user does not have
Fallback name shown when the verifier/issuer name is missing
Button label for unlocking the ID card using biometrics
Shown when scanned QR code has unsupported URL prefix

qrScanner.instructionHeading.message: Use the camera to scan a QR code
comments: Instruction heading for scanning a QR code
qrScanner.instructionHeading.translation: Gebruik daardie camera om 'n QR-kodaardie te skandeer

pinSlide.description.message: Use your app PIN code to confirm the request.
comments: Supporting text explaining why PIN is needed
pinSlide.description.translation: Gebruik jou app-pincodaardie om daardie versoek te bevestig.

menu.setupEid.message.message: Use your eID card to set up your digital identity.
comments: Explanation for setting up eID card
menu.setupEid.message.translation: Gebruik jou eID-kaart om jou digitale identiteit in te stellen.

onboardingIntroduction.step2.description.message: Use your ID card PIN to retrieve your identity information.
comments: Description of the second onboarding step about reading identity info
onboardingIntroduction.step2.description.translation: Gebruik jou ID-kaart pincodaardie om jou identiteitsinligting op te halen.

comments: The time ƒrom which a credential is valid
The value of a driving privilege in an mDL
The vehicle category code of an mDL
Heading shown when user is about to authenticate
Description text for the attributes button
Heading above the wallet section

pidSetup.idCardVerify.Subtitle.message: We need your biometrics to verify your identity.
pidSetup.idCardVerify.Subtitle.translation: We hetis jou biometrie nodig om jou identiteit te verifiëren.

comments: Welcome title in wallet screen
Title for second slide of wallet onboarding
Generic yes/confirm action label
Confirm button text for archiving a card
Confirm button text for deleting a pending card
Explanation that the user is about to sign a document
signing.description.translation: Jou staat op daardie punt om <0>{dokumentName}</0> te ondertekenen.

connection.successParagraph.message:
You can now receive notifications from 
<0>{name}</0>
comments: Explains that the user can now receive notifications from the connected issuer
connection.successParagraph.translation:
Jou kan nou meldingen ontvang van 
<0>{name}</0>

nfcScanner.complete.description.message: You can now remove your eID card.
comments: Description when NFC scan completed successfully
nfcScanner.complete.description.translation: Jy kan nou jou eID-kaart wegleggen.

presentationSuccess.returnHint.message: You can now return to the previous app.
comments: Instruction shown after presentation is completed
presentationSuccess.returnHint.translation: Jou kan nou teruggaan na daardie vorige app.

sharing.failed.missingCredentials.message: You did not have the required credentials to disclose.
comments: Displayed when the user tries to share but lacks the needed credentials
sharing.failed.missingCredentials.translation: Je had nie daardie vereiste kaarte om te delen.

requestedAttributes.partialDescription.message: You don't have all of the requested cards.
comments: Description when the user has some but not all requested cards
requestedAttributes.partialDescription.translation: Jy het nie alle gevraagdaardie kaarte.

inbox.emptyMessage.message: You don't have any notifications at the moment.
comments: Paragraph shown when the inbox is empty
inbox.emptyMessage.translation: Jy het op dit moment geen meldingen.

noContentInbox.message.message: You don't have any notifications at the moment.
comments: Message shown when user has no notifications
noContentInbox.message.translation: Jy het op dit moment geen meldingen.

requestedAttributes.onlyUnsatisfiedDescr.message: You don't have the requested card(s).
comments: Description when the user has none of the requested cards
requestedAttributes.onlyUnsatisfiedDescr.translation: Jy het daardie gevraagdaardie kaart(en) nie.

submission.missingCardsWarning.message: You don't have the required cards
comments: Shown when user lacks required credentials
submission.missingCardsWarning.translation: Jy het nie daardie vereiste kaarte

signShare.missingCards.message: You don't have the required cards
comments: Shown when the user lacks the required credentials
signShare.missingCards.translation: Jy het nie daardie vereiste kaarte

pinLocked.description.message: You have entered an incorrect PIN. The wallet was locked, please reset it to set a new PIN and continue.
comments: Descriptive text explaining that the wallet is locked and must be reset
pinLocked.description.translation: Jy het 'n onjuiste pincodaardie ingevoerd. Daardie beursie is vergrendeld, reset hierdaardie om 'n nieuwe pincodaardie in te stellen en deur te gaan.

activity.receivedSingle.message: You have received the following card from {0}.
comments: Shown in activity detail when one credential has been received
activity.receivedSingle.translation: Jy het daardie volgendaardie kaart ontvang van {0}.

activity.receivedMultiple.message: You have received the following cards from {0}.
comments: Shown in activity detail when multiple credentials have been received
activity.receivedMultiple.translation: Jy het daardie volgendaardie kaarte ontvang van {0}.

onboardingIntroduction.reminder.message: You'll need your eID card to setup the wallet
comments: Reminder shown before user continues onboarding
onboardingIntroduction.reminder.translation: Jy het jou eID-kaart nodig om daardie beursie in te stellen

comments: Heading shown when the inbox is empty
Heading shown when user has no notifications

receiveCredential.deferredCredentialPara.message: Your cards are not yet ready. We will check once in a while in the background and fetch the cards once they're ready.
receiveCredential.deferredCredentialPara.translation: Je kaarte is nog nie klaar. We checken af en toe op daardie agtergrond en halen daardie kaarte op sodra ze klaar is.

cardLifecycle.active.sheetDescription.message: Your credentials may expire or require an active internet connection to validate.
cardLifecycle.active.sheetDescription.translation: Je kaarte kunnen verlopen of hetis 'n actieve internetkoneksie nodig vir validitie.

pidSetup.dataProtection.subtitle.message: Your data is secured with a PIN and biometrics. Each time you share data, we confirm your identity.
pidSetup.dataProtection.subtitle.translation: Je gegees is beveiligd met 'n pincodaardie en biometrie. Elke keer dit jou gegees deelt, bevestig we jou identiteit.

pidSetup.idCardComplete.subtitle.message: Your information has been retrieved from your eID card.
pidSetup.idCardComplete.subtitle.translation: Je inligting is opgehaal van jou eID-kaart.

presentationSuccess.messageWithVerifier.message: Your information has been shared with <0>{verifierName}</0>.
comments: Shown after credentials are shared with a specific verifier
Shown after credentials are shared (no verifier name)

authenticate.pinRequiredToast.message: Your PIN is required to unlock the app
authenticate.pinRequiredToast.translation: Jou pincodaardie is vereist om daardie app te ontgrendelen
